message:
fix: address round 5 review issues across 10 areas

- Associate primitive_end events with args from matching primitive_start
  in groupEvents (keyed by agent_id + tool name) and pass through to
  EventLine/ToolCall rendering
- Add session_start handler to buildAgentTree that resets root status
  to "running" for continue() scenarios
- Remove !root.goal guard so perceive events always update the root goal
- Set root.agentName from agent_id on first depth-0 event
- Add extractArgSummary for richer livePeek context (command, pattern,
  path) instead of only extracting path
- Mark abandoned delegations (pending at session_end) with abandoned
  flag and render as "failed" status in DelegationBlock
- Add exhaustiveness check (kind satisfies never) to renderEvent with
  explicit cases for all previously-unhandled event kinds
- Read model from session_start event data in buildAgentStats
- Remove redundant resetTimestamps() calls in useAgentStats tests
  (beforeEach already handles it)
- Add comprehensive test coverage for args association, livePeekTools,
  extractArgSummary, abandoned delegations, session_start reset, and
  goal updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
